name_cn:
VANITY CHAIN POUCH Handbag #️⃣M47125
Exclusive global launch! This item features custom Italian craftsmanship, dynamic chip code changing, original factory exclusive fabric, and original factory exclusive light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic)
Please compare with the authentic Italian version!
We ensure 100% restoration of the authentic feel! Exclusive original factory fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, official website latest full gift box!
19 x 11.5 x 6.5 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Metal hardware
Zipper closure
Engraved LV on lock
Coin purse
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 49.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 58.0 cm
Chain: Removable
Chain half-length: 26.0 cm
Handle: Single handle
Made in Italy
